supportingMessage: Your generosity funds the day-to-day work of this church — staff, kids ministry, missions, and the family in crisis three blocks away.

offlineGiving.mailingAddress:
Grace Community Church
123 Main Street
Your Town, ST 12345

Make checks payable to Grace Community Church.
offlineGiving.inPersonInstructions: Giving boxes are available at the entrance to the sanctuary. We don't pass an offering plate — give whenever and however you'd like.

faq.question: Is my gift tax-deductible?
faq.answer: [Replace with your church name] is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Your gift is tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. We send annual giving statements every January.

faq.question: Where does my giving go?
faq.answer: [Replace with a summary of how your church allocates giving — for example: staff and ministry programming, building and operations, missions and community care.]

faq.question: Do I have to be a member to give?
faq.answer: Not at all. You're welcome to give whether you've been coming for years or this is your first Sunday. Giving is a response to grace, not a requirement for belonging.

faq.question: How do I get a record of my giving?
faq.answer: [Replace with your process — for example: we email annual giving statements every January, or contact us at hello@example.church and we'll send you a summary.]
